description: Deterministic artifact-placement policy enforced by scripts/artifact-placement-guard.sh (PreToolUse). Distinct from tool-policy.json (which enforces danger). This file enforces LOCATION: task artifacts must land in the active workspace; kit-internal files are editable only in maintainer mode; everything else is blocked and routed. Classification is by destination path, never by prompt intent. Hot-reloaded on every tool call — edit freely.

notes.maintainer_mode: Set JM_ADK_MODE=maintainer or create a ./.maintainer sentinel file to edit kit internals. Without it, writes to system_globs are blocked so end-user task work cannot silently mutate the kit.
notes.fail_open: If python3 or this file is missing, the guard exits 0 (allow). A broken guard must never brick the session.
notes.deny_to_create: A write with no active workspace is denied with an instruction to run 'workspace-manager.sh ensure'. The model creates the workspace then retries — a deterministic, self-healing loop.
